messages.content:
Generate an ATS friendly resume for the following job description.

Job Description: Head of Customer Success
Become part of our leadership team and help us build our CS team to make our customers successful!

Our Customer Success team at Humaans is responsible for providing exceptional experiences to our customers to ensure they can optimise their time and effort for what's really needed - the employees.

If you have built and developed successful customer success teams before and are enthusiastic about building trusted relationships with customers, we'd love to chat!

About us

Hi, we’re Humaans! We help globally scaling organisations transform their HR processes with a human-centric approach.

At Humaans, we want to empower People teams to create a customisable HR stack by offering flexibility and scalability to seamlessly integrate with other best in class platforms and point solutions, such as Google Workplace, Slack, Okta, Greenhouse, Lattice, DocuSign and more. The stack enables companies to manage employee data, documents, contracts, reporting, and people processes that power your entire HR structure.

We have raised $20 million in VC funding to date. Investors include major tech players such as Lachy Groom; Slack founder Stewart Butterfield; Shopify founder Tobias Lütke; Figma Founder Dylan Field; Linkedin ex-CEO Jeff Weiner; Stripe COO Claire Johnson; Y Combinator; Moonfire; Frontline Ventures; Exor and more.

Our journey is only at the beginning, and we’re looking for people excited about driving real impact. As a human centred company (quite literally), every team member counts - and that’s where you come in.

You’re excited by

    Building, leading and executing on a world class Customer Success strategy to drive value for our customers across all touch points with Humaans

    Attracting, retaining and growing exceptional talent across CS, Support and other customer facing areas

    Being a product champion and advocate for Humaans with the world outside

    Supporting executive leaders and operators in achieving key business outcomes

    Constantly building meaningful relationships at executive level

    Contributing to strategy definition for customers from onboarding to growth and renewal

    Establishing Humaans as trusted partner for our customers and turning them into advocates

    Improving customer retention metrics (adoption, retention, engagement)

Things that will get us excited about you

    Track record in building and leading high-performing teams across Customer Success, Customer Support, and Account Management in SaaS with focus around large SMBs and Mid-Market

    Experience in managing accounts ranging from $20k to $100k+ in ACVs

    Strong executive presence and natural propensity to build relationships with C-Suite/Leadership teams at both startups and larger organisations

    Commercial mindset, comfortable with a competitive landscape and focus on driving long-term customer value

    Ability to define metrics and utilise data to improve customer experience

    Ability to attract, retain and grow exceptional talent and able to grow the team in an efficient way and not only by headcount expansion

    Ability to work cross-functionally and harmoniously with Sales and Product/Engineering teams to help drive our strategy and inform business decisions

    Comfortable in a fast paced environment with changing priorities and has experienced early stage company growth (ideally Series B to D)

    Travel to meet customers across Europe from time to time will be required

Package & Benefits

Early stage startups can be messy – we know that. We're putting effort in providing you with the best employee experience and a quality driven environment in exchange for trusting us.

    Salary. Competitive compensation.

    Equity. Meaningful equity so that you own part of the company.

    Flexible working schedule. We're outcome-oriented.

    Time off. 25 days of paid time off per year plus public holidays.

    Health. Private health and dental insurance.

    Technology. A brand new MacBook (or whatever equipment you need).

    Set up. £500 working from home budget.

    Learning and development. Budget for books and other resources you need.

Our Commitment to Diversity

At Humaans we’re looking for genuinely good people that are transparent and emphatic. We’re committed to providing equal opportunities, a diverse and inclusive work environment, and ensuring a fair interview process for everyone. You’re welcome to apply no matter your gender, ethnicity, sexual orientation, religion, civil or family status, age, disability, or race.

- Traveled throughout Europe to meet customers and build relationships.

Professional Experience:

- Designed and implemented a world-class Customer Success strategy, leading to significant improvements in customer retention metrics (adoption, retention, engagement).
- Recruited, mentored, and managed top talent across Customer Success, Support, and Account Management teams, fostering a high-performance culture focused on client satisfaction.
- Successfully managed a diverse portfolio of accounts with contract values ranging from $20k to $100k+.
- Nurtured and strengthened key relationships with C-Suite and leadership teams at startups as well as larger organizations, ensuring alignment on business objectives and driving long-term value.
- Facilitated cross-functional collaboration with Sales and Product/Engineering teams, ensuring seamless integration of customer success initiatives with overall business strategy.
- Represented the company at various international client engagements, building customer trust and loyalty across Europe.

[Company Name]
Senior Customer Success Manager, [Start Date] - [End Date]
- Oversaw the successful onboarding, growth, and renewal of a diverse portfolio of clients, driving high levels of satisfaction and long-term value.
- Served as a product champion and advocate, promoting the company's offerings to clients and prospects, and securing strategic business partnerships.
- Utilized data analytics and key performance metrics to refine customer experiences, ensuring continuous improvements in service delivery.

[University Name]
Bachelor of Arts/Science in [Major], [Graduation Year]

- Exceptional relationship-building skills with executive-level stakeholders
- Strong commercial acumen and focus on driving long-term customer value
- Proficient in cross-functional collaboration with Sales and Product/Engineering teams
- Adaptable to fast-paced and changing environments, with experience in early-stage company growth (Series B to D)

Additional Information:
- Willing to travel across Europe to meet clients and develop strategic partnerships
- Data-driven approach to enhancing customer experiences and satisfaction
- Experienced in working with globally scaling organizations and SaaS companies

identify the key mission of this company: https://humaans.io

The key mission of Humaans is to help globally scaling organizations transform their HR processes with a human-centric approach. They empower People teams to create a customizable HR stack by offering flexibility and scalability to seamlessly integrate with other best-in-class platforms and point solutions, ultimately enabling companies to manage employee data, documents, contracts, reporting, and people processes that power their entire HR structure.
can you shorten that to a 4-8 word sound bite
Empowering HR with human-centric solutions.
why would a potential employee want to work for this company?

A potential employee would want to work for Humaans because of their commitment to providing a positive employee experience and fostering a diverse and inclusive work environment. The company offers competitive compensation, meaningful equity, flexible work schedules, and professional growth opportunities. Additionally, Humaans focuses on empowering HR and enhancing people processes, which could attract those who are passionate about making a real impact on the lives and experiences of employees within organizations globally.
Could you summarise that into a short sentence?
At Humaans, employees enjoy a diverse, inclusive environment with growth opportunities, competitive benefits, and the chance to make a meaningful impact on global HR processes.
could you make this stand out more for anyone reading dozens of similar responses to this question?

Join Humaans for a truly unique experience: thrive in a vibrant and diverse culture, drive unprecedented growth opportunities, enjoy exceptional rewards, and become an integral force in revolutionizing the global HR landscape.
Why would an individual with 10+ years in the Customer Experience field want to join this company as the Head of Customer Success?

An individual with 10+ years in the Customer Experience field would be drawn to join Humaans as the Head of Customer Success due to the opportunity to shape and lead a world-class customer success strategy within an innovative, fast-growing, and well-funded company. At Humaans, they can leverage their expertise in fostering meaningful relationships with clients, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and actively contribute to the company's mission of revolutionizing the global HR landscape – making a tangible impact on the success of scaling organizations and the lives of their employees.
What is this company's mission?

Humaans' mission is to empower HR with human-centric solutions, helping globally scaling organizations transform their HR processes by offering flexibility, scalability, and seamless integration with best-in-class platforms and point solutions to manage employee data, documents, contracts, reporting, and various people processes.
rewrite this mission using terminology from the company's website

Humaans' mission is to streamline HR operations by crafting a human-centric, customizable HR stack that seamlessly integrates with best-in-class platforms, enabling companies to efficiently manage employee data, documents, contracts, and reporting while transforming people processes across globally scaling organizations.
rewrite this with language better suited to a tweet
Humaans: Streamlining HR with a customizable, human-centric stack, seamlessly integrating top platforms for efficient employee management in scaling organizations. #Humaans #HRTransformation✨🚀

1. identify Humaans mission statement based on their website
2. reframe it for a bullet point on a resume

1. Humaans' mission statement, based on their website, is to help organizations scale with a modern, flexible, and integrated HR platform that transforms people processes, making companies more efficient and enjoyable to work for.

2. Reframed mission for a resume bullet point: Contributed to Humaans' mission by transforming people processes with a modern, flexible, and integrated HR platform, enhancing organizational efficiency and employee experience.
Why would an individual with 10+ years in the Customer Experience field want to join this company as the Head of Customer Success, and contribute to achieving their mission?

An individual with 10+ years in the Customer Experience field would be eager to join Humaans as the Head of Customer Success and contribute to their mission because it presents a unique opportunity to apply their expertise in shaping and leading an exceptional customer success strategy within a fast-growing, innovative company focused on transforming HR processes. They will have the chance to build meaningful relationships with clients, collaborate with cross-functional teams, and drive customer satisfaction by reinforcing the integration of Humaans' human-centric, customizable HR platform in scaling organizations —ultimately enhancing workplace efficiency and employee experiences around the world.
what are some personal elements of this individual that might make them a suitable fit for this company?

Some personal elements that might make an individual with 10+ years in the Customer Experience field a suitable fit for Humaans include:

1. Passion for human-centric solutions: A genuine interest in transforming HR processes and positively impacting employee experiences in the workplace.

2. Adaptability: An ability to thrive in a dynamic, fast-paced environment, demonstrating flexibility and resilience in the face of changing priorities and company growth.

3. Strong relationship-building skills: A natural propensity for nurturing connections with executive-level stakeholders and fostering long-lasting partnerships.

4. Cross-functional collaboration: Adeptness in working harmoniously with Sales, Product, and Engineering teams, facilitating efficient communication and ensuring success across the organization.

5. Leadership and team-building abilities: A proven track record of inspiring, mentoring, and guiding high-performing customer success teams, and effectively growing talent.

6. Data-driven mindset: An aptitude for using data and metrics to make informed decisions, identify opportunities for improvement, and optimize customer experiences.

7. Commitment to diversity and inclusion: A genuine belief in fostering an inclusive work environment, where the unique perspectives and backgrounds of each team member are valued and embraced.

These personal elements, when combined with their extensive experience and expertise in the Customer Experience field, have the potential to make the individual an exceptional fit for Humaans and drive success in the Head of Customer Success role.
are there any other passions this candidate might possess?

Here are some additional passions the candidate might possess that would contribute to their success at Humaans:

1. Technological innovation: A keen interest in staying abreast of the latest advances in SaaS platforms, HR technology, and integration solutions, and harnessing them to benefit Humaans' customer success strategy.

2. Customer advocacy: A strong commitment to listening to customers, understanding their unique needs, and acting as their voice within the organization, ensuring customer feedback consistently informs product roadmap and company strategy.

3. Continuous learning and personal growth: A dedication to enhancing their own skill set, staying current with industry trends, and encouraging a culture of learning and development within their team.

4. Empathy and emotional intelligence: An ability to understand and appreciate the significance of diverse experiences and perspectives, fostering a supportive and collaborative work environment where every individual feels valued.

5. Results-oriented mindset: A drive to set ambitious goals, consistently measure performance, and celebrate team successes, fostering a culture of accountability and achievement at Humaans.

These passions, combined with the candidate's professional expertise and personal attributes, would contribute to their overall effectiveness as the Head of Customer Success at Humaans, driving value for both the customers and the company.
What are some key strengths this candidate would need to possess to be successful in this role?

To be successful as the Head of Customer Success at Humaans, the candidate would need to possess the following key strengths:

1. Strategic thinking: The ability to develop and implement a comprehensive customer success strategy aligned with the company's mission, goals, and customer needs.

2. Leadership and team management: Proven experience in building, mentoring, and leading high-performing customer success teams while fostering a collaborative and results-oriented culture.

3. Relationship building: Exceptional interpersonal skills and the ability to nurture strong, long-term relationships with customers, stakeholders, and cross-functional teams.

4. Customer-centric approach: A genuine passion for driving customer satisfaction, proactively addressing concerns, and supporting clients in achieving their goals.

5. Analytical skills: The aptitude to leverage data, metrics, and insights to make informed decisions, identify opportunities for improvement, and optimize customer experiences.

6. Problem-solving abilities: The capability to identify and address customer pain points, implement effective solutions, and contribute to ongoing product development and enhancement.

7. Adaptability and resilience: A flexible mindset and the capacity to manage change effectively, including rapidly growing organizations and evolving industry landscapes.

These key strengths, along with the candidate's passion and relevant experience, would contribute to their success in the Head of Customer Success role at Humaans, leading to higher levels of customer satisfaction, retention, and overall business growth.
since this is a leadership position, what are some common traits across the rest of the leadership team?

Although specific traits may vary across individuals, successful leaders on Humaans' leadership team are likely to share some common characteristics, such as:

1. Visionary thinking: The ability to anticipate future needs, trends, and challenges while setting a clear direction aligned with the company's long-term goals.

2. Collaborative mindset: Effective cross-functional collaboration and willingness to tap into the collective knowledge, expertise, and experience of teammates to drive success.

3. Effective communication: The capability to convey complex concepts and ideas clearly and concisely while being able to listen actively and empathetically to others.

4. Decision-making abilities: Adeptness in making informed, data-driven decisions under pressure and considering the best interests of customers, employees, and the company.

5. Emotional intelligence: A strong sense of self-awareness, social awareness, and the ability to manage emotions and foster meaningful connections with others, including customers, employees, and stakeholders.

6. Adaptability and resilience: The capacity to navigate through rapid change and challenges while maintaining a strong sense of purpose and focus on the company's mission.

7. Inspirational leadership: The ability to inspire, empower, and develop talents within their teams, promoting a culture of continuous learning, innovation, and high performance.

8. Commitment to diversity and inclusion: Embracing the unique backgrounds, perspectives, and contributions of each team member, fostering a work environment where everyone feels valued and heard.

By possessing these common traits, the leadership team at Humaans can effectively guide the company's growth, achieve strategic goals, and cultivate a thriving and innovative organizational culture.
are these generic traits, or are they specific to the specific individuals in leadership positions at Humaans?

The traits mentioned above are generally considered essential for effective leadership across industries and organizations. However, they are not specific to the individuals in leadership positions at Humaans, as the precise characteristics of each leader might vary based on personal strengths, experiences, and backgrounds. To ascertain the exact traits of Humaans' leadership team, more in-depth information about each member would be required. Nevertheless, these traits provide a solid foundation for what to expect in successful leaders and can be considered relevant qualities for a Head of Customer Success role at Humaans or similar companies.
What are some common traits for Customer success leaders in companies of a similar size, and in the same industry?

For Customer Success leaders in companies of a similar size and operating in the same industry, some common traits include:

1. Customer-centric mindset: A genuine passion for delivering exceptional customer experiences, understanding customer needs, and serving as an advocate for customers within the organization.

2. Strong relationship building skills: The ability to forge meaningful, long-lasting relationships with clients and stakeholders to ensure their satisfaction, loyalty, and advocacy.

3. Strategic thinking and execution: Developing and implementing customer success strategies that align with the company's mission, goals, and customer requirements to ensure continuous growth and customer satisfaction.

4. Proven leadership: Experience in building, managing, and mentoring high-performing customer success teams, with a focus on developing talent, fostering collaboration, and driving results.

5. Adaptability and resilience: Flexibility to navigate change and guide the team through shifting priorities, emerging challenges, and evolving market landscapes.

6. Analytical skills: A data-driven mindset and the ability to interpret customer and performance data to make informed decisions, identify trends, and improve customer experiences.

7. Collaborative approach: Working effectively with cross-functional teams, such as Sales, Product, and Engineering, to deliver a cohesive customer experience and drive organizational success.

8. Effective communication: Exceptional interpersonal and communication skills to clearly articulate goals, expectations, and feedback to customers, team members, and stakeholders.

9. Industry expertise: A deep understanding of the specific industry, market trends, customer needs, and competitive landscape to inform customer success strategies and anticipate future challenges.

These common traits, when combined with a Customer Success leader's specialized expertise and experience, contribute to driving customer satisfaction, retention, and revenue growth in similar-sized companies within the same industry.
for each of these, please specify 1-3 example work experiences that may be used in a resume. Tailor the examples to align with applying for the role of Head of Customer Success at Humaans

1. Customer-centric mindset:
- Implemented a customer feedback program that directly influenced product enhancements, leading to a 15% increase in customer satisfaction scores.
- Established quarterly business reviews, enabling tailored recommendations and ensuring alignment with clients' evolving needs and goals.

2. Strong relationship building skills:
- Consistently achieved over 90% client retention by fostering long-term relationships and addressing customer concerns proactively.
- Expanded the customer base by 50% through targeted outreach and leveraging relationships for referrals and testimonials.

3. Strategic thinking and execution:
- Designed a comprehensive onboarding process, reducing customer churn by 20% during the first 90 days and ensuring a seamless transition for new clients.
- Developed a customer success playbook, streamlining internal processes and enabling the team to efficiently handle a 35% increase in the client base.

4. Proven leadership:
- Built and led a customer success team of 10+ members, achieving a 95% yearly client retention rate and consistently surpassing customer satisfaction targets.
- Implemented a mentorship program that improved employee retention by 25% and accelerated professional development within the customer success team.

5. Adaptability and resilience:
- Pivoted customer communication strategies during the COVID-19 pandemic, providing timely updates and support, facilitating a 98% customer retention rate during turbulent times.
- Successfully navigated a company merger, integrating customer success teams and maintaining a seamless experience for clients.

6. Analytical skills:
- Leveraged data insights to identify trends and opportunities for improvement, resulting in a 20% increase in customer engagement metrics.
- Conducted regular metrics-driven assessments, enabling targeted interventions that reduced customer churn by 18%.

7. Collaborative approach:
- Collaborated with Product and Engineering teams to influence product roadmap, prioritizing enhancements that addressed 80% of common customer pain points.
- Partnered with Sales to develop integrated account strategies, increasing cross-sell and upsell revenue by 25% YoY.

8. Effective communication:
- Delivered presentations at annual customer conferences to showcase product updates and best practices, receiving consistently positive feedback and bolstering customer relationships.
- Regularly engaged with C-suite stakeholders, providing strategic insights and guidance to maximize the value of Humaans' platform for their businesses.

9. Industry expertise:
- Conducted competitive analyses to identify and address key differentiators, leading to enhancements in service offerings and a 30% increase in new business.
- Exhibited thought leadership by publishing industry-relevant articles and speaking at webinars, boosting brand awareness and positioning Humaans as an expert in the HR tech space.

These example work experiences, tailored for the role of Head of Customer Success at Humaans, demonstrate the candidate's strong track record in driving customer success, building relationships, and achieving tangible results in similar contexts.
Why would a candidate with these experiences want to work for Humaans, and in particular as their head of customer success?

A candidate with these experiences would be attracted to work for Humaans and, in particular, as their Head of Customer Success for several reasons:

1. Impactful mission: Humaans' focus on transforming HR processes with human-centric solutions aligns with the candidate's passion for customer-centricity and delivering exceptional experiences. They would have the opportunity to contribute meaningfully to the company's mission and make a positive impact on organizations globally.

2. Innovative company: Humaans is an innovative and fast-growing company with a strong market presence and a commitment to staying ahead in the HR tech space. The candidate would have the opportunity to be at the forefront of cutting-edge technology and contribute to shaping the future of HR.

3. Leadership opportunity: As the Head of Customer Success, the candidate would play a vital role in shaping and driving the company's customer success strategies, enabling them to leverage their extensive experience and expertise to make a significant impact on the overall success of Humaans.

4. Collaborative environment: Humaans' emphasis on cross-functional collaboration offers the candidate the chance to work closely with other teams, such as Sales, Product, and Engineering, aligning customer success initiatives and jointly driving the company's growth and success.

5. Growth potential: Given Humaans' strong market position and ambitious growth plans, the candidate would have the opportunity to be part of an exciting journey and contribute to the company's continued expansion while building a world-class Customer Success team.

6. Company culture and values: Humaans' commitment to diversity, inclusion, and fostering a positive work environment aligns with the candidate's values and would provide a supportive atmosphere for them to thrive professionally and personally.

In summary, a candidate with these experiences would be eager to join Humaans as the Head of Customer Success due to the rare opportunity to influence and shape a customer success strategy within a fast-growing, innovative company, and contribute meaningfully to transforming HR processes for organizations around the world.
